reducibility_question: Is PhaseFrontCharge(t,gamma) uniquely determined by the known_data_package?
reduction_outcome: If no counterexample exists, record wall-strengthening reduction: PhaseFrontCharge is fixed by metric, stress-energy, and null-cone data.
nonreduction_outcome: If a counterexample exists, record first nonmetric DFM-MKC/SIDFH residual candidate.
guardrails: Only defines the bounded reducibility test.
next_admissible_step: Construct or rule out a same-g same-stress-energy different-winding pair for theta.
